3069950.name: Fantasy Grounds - Temple of the Deep Dark
3069950.description:
The Temple of the Deep Dark

A Level 3 Adventure for the Shadowdark RPG Produced by Bardic Mischief
Adventure Lies Ahead!
Encouraged by the prospect of rewards, fame, and aiding their village, the heroes set forth from the home towards the swamp. Along the way, they stumble upon a distressed family besieged by corrupted creatures at their dilapidated farm, prompting the adventurers to delve deeper into the marsh. Their journey leads them to a mysterious temple, where a Kraken Cult is harnessing the magic of a fairy dragon to nurture an infant Kraken, thereby corrupting the surrounding land.
This adventure is a crawl that can be dropped into almost any existing campaign or just played as is.
  • 20 New Monsters
  • Beautiful Maps
  • 6 New Magic Items
  • 30 Custom Tokens
  • A New Evil Deity
Writing and character design are original.
Written by David Cole - Bardic Mischief
Maps produced using Dungeondraft.
Images created using Midjourney Ai
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: David Cole
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and a one time purchase of the Shadowdark RPG ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
